title: Fix font colors to white on Review, Filter, and Contact pages

requirements.summary: Change all text elements in the Reviews page and CustomerReviews component to white or off-white for legibility against the dark background
acceptanceCriteria: All text in the Reviews/CustomerReviews section is white or off-white and clearly readable against the background.
Reviewer names, review body text, star rating labels, and pagination controls all have sufficient contrast.
No dark-on-dark or invisible text remains in the reviews area.

file_operations.description: Update all text color classes (review body text, reviewer names, star rating labels, date labels, headings, and pagination controls) to use white or off-white colors (e.g., text-white, text-gray-100, text-cream) to ensure legibility against the dark background. Replace any dark text colors (text-gray-800, text-gray-900, text-black) with light variants.

Update all text color classes throughout the Reviews page (including headings, review body text, reviewer names, star rating labels, date stamps, and any filter/sort controls) to white or off-white colors for contrast against the dark theme. Ensure pagination controls and any other interactive text elements are also set to light colors.

requirements.summary: Change all filter tab labels, search input text, placeholder text, and category button text in the Menu page filter section to white or legible light color
acceptanceCriteria: All tab labels in MenuTabs are white and readable against their backgrounds.
Active and inactive tab states both have legible white or light-colored text.
Search bar placeholder and typed text are white or off-white.
No filter-related text is invisible or hard to read.

file_operations.description: Update all tab label text colors (both active and inactive states) to white or off-white. Replace any dark text color classes with light variants (text-white, text-gray-100, text-cream) to ensure category button text is legible against their backgrounds.

Update the search input field's text color and placeholder color to white or off-white. Ensure any filter control labels, sort dropdowns, or other text elements on the Menu page use light colors for contrast. Replace dark text classes with text-white, text-gray-100, or text-cream as appropriate.

requirements.summary: Change all text elements on the Contact page to white or light-contrast color for legibility against dark or colored backgrounds
acceptanceCriteria: All headings and body text on the Contact page are white or off-white and clearly readable.
Form labels, input placeholder text, and helper text are legible white on their backgrounds.
Contact info items (address, phone, email, hours) display in white with sufficient contrast.
Button text and icon labels on the Contact page are readable.
No text on the Contact page is invisible or unreadably dark.

file_operations.description: Update all text color classes throughout the Contact page including section headings, body text, form field labels, input placeholder text, contact info items (address, phone, email, business hours), button text, icon labels, and helper text to white or off-white colors (text-white, text-gray-100, text-cream). Replace all dark text color classes to ensure sufficient contrast against the page's dark or colored backgrounds.
